- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
  Static browser-based exam seating planner for GitHub Pages with Excel import, editable seating layout, draggable fixtures and seats, and PDF export.

- [x] Scaffold the Project
  Implemented as a pure static site in the workspace root using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript so it can run on GitHub Pages without paid hosting or a build server.

- [x] Customize the Project
  Added worksheet import, column mapping, auto-detection, seating plan generation, inline text editing, draggable layout items, and PDF export.

- [x] Install Required Extensions
  No extensions were required for this project.

- [x] Compile the Project
  Validated in a local browser session by loading the page, importing sample data, generating a seating plan, confirming drag state updates, and exporting a PDF.

- [x] Create and Run Task
  No VS Code task was required because the app is a static site.

- [x] Launch the Project
  Opened locally in the browser for validation.

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
  README updated with usage and deployment notes, GitHub Pages workflow added, and template comments removed from this file.

- Keep communication concise and focused.
- Follow development best practices.
